summary: Completed comprehensive testing of cached store pattern for Marketplace and Experts directory pages. All functional flows work correctly with instant page loads on return visits (stale-while-revalidate pattern working as designed).

minor_issues.issue: JavaScript parse errors from Cloudflare RUM (Real User Monitoring) endpoint failures
minor_issues.details: Multiple 'Unexpected token }' errors from /cdn-cgi/rum? requests being aborted. These are external to the application code and do not affect functionality.
minor_issues.impact: Console noise only, no functional impact

passed_tests: Login flow works and redirects to /home
Marketplace Browse tab renders listings without errors (50 items)
Source filter switching works (all → for_sale) and grid updates correctly
My Listings tab renders user's listings (50 items) via cached store
Switching between Browse and My Listings tabs preserves data (no loss)
Navigation /market → /closet → /market shows NO spinner on return (cached data appears instantly)
Navigation /experts → /home → /experts shows NO skeleton on return (cached data appears instantly)
Experts search functionality works (typing + Search button triggers refresh)
Experts Clear button resets filters and list to default view
Sync from closet button works without crashing (synced 14 items: 1 listed, 13 already on marketplace)
AppLayout prewarm verified: all three stores (closet, marketplace browse/myListings, experts) are prewarmed at boot
Stale-while-revalidate pattern confirmed: cached data displays instantly while background revalidation occurs

cache_behavior_analysis.prewarm_at_boot: ✅ Confirmed - All stores (closet, marketplace browse/myListings, experts) are prewarmed in AppLayout after auth
cache_behavior_analysis.instant_page_loads: ✅ Confirmed - No spinner/skeleton shown on return visits to /market and /experts
cache_behavior_analysis.stale_while_revalidate: ✅ Working correctly - Cached data displays immediately, background API calls refresh data silently
cache_behavior_analysis.filter_stability: ✅ Confirmed - Filter objects wrapped in useMemo with primitive deps prevent infinite re-fetch loops
cache_behavior_analysis.my_listings_seller_id: ✅ Confirmed - Derives seller_id from useAuth() and user's own listings appear correctly
cache_behavior_analysis.experts_draft_applied_pattern: ✅ Confirmed - Separate draft/applied filter state prevents network calls on every keystroke

network_request_tracking.second_visit_market: Background revalidation occurs but UI shows cached data instantly
network_request_tracking.second_visit_experts: Background revalidation occurs but UI shows cached data instantly
